g.text: Thread Pool Data Structures: Work Queue & Synchronization (thread_pool.h)
mutex + start of not_empty = HOT FIELD: lock/unlock touches here
not_empty tail + not_full head share this line
shutdown flag: written by main, polled by workers
RED path → lock/unlock touches CL0 (mutex state)
GREEN path → enqueue signal touches CL0+CL1 (not_empty)
BLUE path → dequeue signal touches CL1+CL2 (not_full)
Goal: mutex+not_empty hot together; shutdown on separate line
head = 3 → next item to dequeue (consumer reads here)
tail = 7 → next slot to fill (producer writes here)
no memmove() — indices wrap via modulo
both ops hold lock for <100 ns
fits in L2 cache (256 KB typical)
producer at tail, consumer at head = no false sharing
P3: if count==N → unlock → send 503 → close(client_fd)
